```
=== accept-the-starting-line ===
---
title: "Accept the Starting Line"
meta_title: "Accept the Starting Line - Real Limits Before Real Targets"
description: "I accept where I actually start - then pick targets that match, not fantasy."
key_concept: |
  - Acceptance isn't quitting - it's refusing to plan for a person who doesn't exist yet.
  - Accept the starting line means I name real limits this quarter - time, skill, bandwidth - before I promise the room a transformation.
  - [[Honest Self-Awareness]] is the inventory; this note is the move: pick targets from the real line, not the inspirational poster.
  - Faith parallel: [[Grace]] already settled standing - sanctification grows from where I am, not from pretending I arrived.
  - I accept where I actually start - then pick targets that match, not fantasy.
examples:
  - "I wanted fifty notes reviewed weekly and burned out in ten days - accept the starting line was ten minutes on the jeepney, then build from there."
  - "The team wanted a full platform migration by Q2 with one engineer - accept the starting line meant one service moved, not a slide deck pretending we had three hires."
shareable_thought:
  - "I accept where I actually start - then pick targets that match, not fantasy."
  - "Acceptance isn't quitting - it's refusing to plan for a person who doesn't exist yet."
  - "Accept the starting line means I name real limits this quarter."
  - "Time, skill, bandwidth - before I promise the room a transformation."
relationships:
  - type: alternative
    wikilink: "[[There Is No Perfect Solution]]"
    reason: "when waiting to feel ready blocks the good-enough starting target"
  - type: contradicts
    wikilink: "[[Growth Mindset]]"
    reason: "when 'still learning' excuses never updating the starting line"
  - type: extends
    wikilink: "[[Develop, Don't Endanger]]"
    reason: "Real limits - challenge without fantasy bandwidth"
  - type: extends
    wikilink: "[[Grace]]"
    reason: "Grace settled standing -
… (output truncated)
```

```bash
from pathlib import Path
import sys
sys.path.insert(0, 'scripts')
from garden_voice_lint import scan_note, ROOT

files = '''accept-the-starting-line analog-capture-tools atomic-notes blameless-after-action-review building-a-second-brain break-the-escalation-cycle follow-christ-then-lead follow-their-lead gentleness getting-started goodness graph habit-stacking heed-every-near-miss inbox-zero joy listen-before-fixing mobile-capture-workflows name-the-feeling network-analysis normalization-of-deviance notice-the-good okf-export outcomes-over-pitch-decks own-the-error own-your-part para-method patience peace peacemakers people-centered-design periodic-knowledge-review plain-commitments-at-work platform-reach-is-borrowed practice-small-experiments preparedness present-a-living-sacrifice pressure-reveals-weakness priorities-before-the-inbox process-over-outcomes psychological-safety purpose-and-vision quarterly-planning random-duo read-later-queue reconcile-before-the-review reconciliation-before-worship recovery reliability render-unto-caesar renewed-mind repent-and-believe resilience reversibility rollback-principle safety-by-design safety-comes-first sanctification'''.split()

print(f'TOTAL: {len(issues)}')
"
```

```bash
import importlib.util
from pathlib import Path

spec = importlib.util.spec_from_file_location("gvl", "scripts/garden-voice-lint.py")
gvl = importlib.util.module_from_spec(spec)
spec.loader.exec_module(gvl)

files = """accept-the-starting-line analog-capture-tools atomic-notes blameless-after-action-review building-a-second-brain break-the-escalation-cycle follow-christ-then-lead follow-their-lead gentleness getting-started goodness graph habit-stacking heed-every-near-miss inbox-zero joy listen-before-fixing mobile-capture-workflows name-the-feeling network-analysis normalization-of-deviance notice-the-good okf-export outcomes-over-pitch-decks own-the-error own-your-part para-method patience peace peacemakers people-centered-design periodic-knowledge-review plain-commitments-at-work platform-reach-is-borrowed practice-small-experiments preparedness present-a-living-sacrifice pressure-reveals-weakness priorities-before-the-inbox process-over-outcomes psychological-safety purpose-and-vision quarterly-planning random-duo read-later-queue reconcile-before-the-review reconciliation-before-worship recovery reliability render-unto-caesar renewed-mind repent-and-believe resilience reversibility rollback-principle safety-by-design safety-comes-first sanctification""".split()

issues = []
missing = []
for f in files:
    p = gvl.ROOT / "content/english/notes" / f"{f}.md"
    if not p.exists():
        missing.append(f)
        continue
    issues.extend(gvl.scan_note(p))

for i in sorted(issues, key=lambda x: (x.path, x.field, x.rule)):
    print(f"{i.path}: {i.field}: {i.rule}" + (f" ({i.detail})" if i.detail else ""))
print(f"MISSING: {missing}")
print(f"TOTAL ISSUES: {len(issues)}")
print(f"FILES WITH ISSUES: {len(set(i.path for i in issues))}")
```

```bash
cd /home/jorap/Documents/GitHub/jorap.com && python3 << 'PYEOF'
import re
from pathlib import Path

ROOT = Path("content/english/notes")
FILES = """accept-the-starting-line analog-capture-tools atomic-notes blameless-after-action-review building-a-second-brain break-the-escalation-cycle follow-christ-then-lead follow-their-lead gentleness getting-started goodness graph habit-stacking heed-every-near-miss inbox-zero joy listen-before-fixing mobile-capture-workflows name-the-feeling network-analysis normalization-of-deviance notice-the-good okf-export outcomes-over-pitch-decks own-the-error own-your-part para-method patience peace peacemakers people-centered-design periodic-knowledge-review plain-commitments-at-work platform-reach-is-borrowed practice-small-experiments preparedness present-a-living-sacrifice pressure-reveals-weakness priorities-before-the-inbox process-over-outcomes psychological-safety purpose-and-vision quarterly-planning random-duo read-later-queue reconcile-before-the-review reconciliation-before-worship recovery reliability render-unto-caesar renewed-mind repent-and-believe resilience reversibility rollback-principle safety-by-design safety-comes-first sanctification""".split()

# Order matters: longer first
CONTRACTIONS = [
    ("Don't", "Do not"), ("don't", "do not"), ("Doesn't", "Does not"), ("doesn't", "does not"),
    ("Didn't", "Did not"), ("didn't", "did not"), ("Won't", "Will not"), ("won't", "will not"),
    ("Can't", "Cannot"), ("can't", "cannot"), ("Wouldn't", "Would not"), ("wouldn't", "would not"),
    ("Shouldn't", "Should not"), ("shouldn't", "should not"), ("Isn't", "Is not"), ("isn't", "is not"),
    ("Aren't", "Are not"), ("aren't", "are not"), ("Wasn't", "Was not"), ("wasn't", "was not"),
    ("Weren't", "Were not"), ("weren't", "were not"), ("Haven't", "Have not"), ("haven't", "have not"),
    ("Hasn't", "Has not"), ("hasn't", "has not"), ("Hadn't", "Had not"), ("hadn't", "had not"),
    ("I'm", "I am"), ("I'd", "I would"), ("I'll", "I will"), ("I've", "I have"),
    ("you're", "you are"), ("You're", "You are"), ("you'd", "you would"), ("You'd", "You would"),
    ("you'll", "you will"), ("You'll", "You will"), ("you've", "you have"), ("You've", "You have"),
    ("we're", "we are"), ("We're", "We are"), ("we've", "we have"), ("We've", "We have"),
    ("they're", "they are"), ("They're", "They are"), ("they'd", "they would"), ("They'd", "They would"),
    ("who'd", "who would"), ("it's", "it is"), ("It's", "It is"),
]

FM = re.compile(r"^(---\s*\n)(.*?)(\n---)", re.DOTALL)

def expand_contractions(text):
    for old, new in CONTRACTIONS:
        text = text.replace(old, new)
    return text

def fix_fm_field(fm, field_pattern, transform):
    def repl(m):
        indent, content = m.group(1), m.group(2)
        return f"{indent}{transform(content)}"
    return re.sub(field_pattern, repl, fm, flags=re.DOTALL)

changed = []
for slug in FILES:
    path = ROOT / f"{slug}.md"
    if not path.exists():
        print(f"MISSING {slug}")
        continue
    raw = path.read_text(encoding="utf-8")
    m = FM.match(raw)
    if not m:
        continue
    fm = m.group(2)
    body = raw[m.end():]
    new_fm = fm

    # Expand contractions in scalar fields
    for field in ("description", "key_concept"):
        pat = rf"^({field}: \|\n)((?:  .*\n)+)"
        def fix_block(block, _field=field):
            return expand_contractions(block)
        new_fm = re.sub(pat, lambda m: m.group(1) + expand_contractions(m.group(2)), new_fm, flags=re.MULTILINE)
        pat2 = rf"^{field}: \"([^\"]*)\""
        new_fm = re.sub(pat2, lambda m: f'{field}: "{expand_contractions(m.group(1))}"', new_fm, flags=re.MULTILINE)

    # examples and shareable_thought list items
    for field in ("examples", "shareable_thought"):
        pat = rf"^({field}:\n)((?:  - \"[^\"]*\"\n)+)"
        new_fm = re.sub(pat, lambda m: m.group(1) + expand_contractions(m.group(2)), new_fm, flags=re.MULTILINE)

    # relationships.reason
    new_fm = re.sub(r'(reason: ")([^"]*)( ")', lambda m: m.group(1) + expand_contractions(m.group(2)) + m.group(3), new_fm)

    if new_fm != fm:
        path.write_text(m.group(1) + new_fm + m.group(3) + body, encoding="utf-8")
        changed.append(slug)

print(f"Contraction fixes: {len(changed)} files")
for s in changed:
    print(f"  {s}")
PYEOF
```

CONTRACTIONS = [
    (&#34;Don&#39;t&#34;, &#34;Do not&#34;), (&#34;don&#39;t&#34;, &#34;do not&#34;), (&#34;Doesn&#39;t&#34;, &#34;Does not&#34;), (&#34;doesn&#39;t&#34;, &#34;does not&#34;),
    (&#34;Didn&#39;t&#34;, &#34;Did not&#34;), (&#34;didn&#39;t&#34;, &#34;did not&#34;), (&#34;Won&#39;t&#34;, &#34;Will not&#34;), (&#34;won&#39;t&#34;, &#34;will not&#34;),
    (&#34;Can&#39;t&#34;, &#34;Cannot&#34;), (&#34;can&#39;t&#34;, &#34;cannot&#34;), (&#34;Wouldn&#39;t&#34;, &#34;Would not&#34;), (&#34;wouldn&#39;t&#34;, &#34;would not&#34;),
    (&#34;Shouldn&#39;t&#34;, &#34;Should not&#34;), (&#34;shouldn&#39;t&#34;, &#34;should not&#34;), (&#34;Isn&#39;t&#34;, &#34;Is not&#34;), (&#34;isn&#39;t&#34;, &#34;is not&#34;),
    (&#34;Aren&#39;t&#34;, &#34;Are not&#34;), (&#34;aren&#39;t&#34;, &#34;are not&#34;), (&#34;Wasn&#39;t&#34;, &#34;Was not&#34;), (&#34;wasn&#39;t&#34;, &#34;was not&#34;),
    (&#34;I&#39;m&#34;, &#34;I am&#34;), (&#34;I&#39;d&#34;, &#34;I would&#34;), (&#34;I&#39;ll&#34;, &#34;I will&#34;), (&#34;I&#39;ve&#34;, &#34;I have&#34;),
    (&#34;you&#39;re&#34;, &#34;you are&#34;), (&#34;you&#39;d&#34;, &#34;you would&#34;), (&#34;you&#39;ll&#34;, &#34;you will&#34;), (&#34;you&#39;ve&#34;, &#34;you have&#34;),
    (&#34;we&#39;re&#34;, &#34;we are&#34;), (&#34;we&#39;ve&#34;, &#34;we have&#34;), (&#34;they&#39;re&#34;, &#34;they are&#34;), (&#34;they&#39;d&#34;, &#34;they would&#34;),
    (&#34;who&#39;d&#34;, &#34;who would&#34;), (&#34;it&#39;s&#34;, &#34;it is&#34;), (&#34;couldn&#39;t&#34;, &#34;could not&#34;),
]

FM = re.compile(r&#34;^(---\s*\n)(.*?)(\n---)&#34;, re.DOTALL)

def expand(text):
    for old, new in CONTRACTIONS:
        text = text.replace(old, new)
    return text

for slug in FILES:
    path = ROOT / f&#34;{slug}.md&#34;
    raw = path.read_text(encoding=&#34;utf-8&#34;)
    m = FM.match(raw)
    if not m:
        continue
    fm, body = m.group(2), raw[m.end():]
    new_fm = expand(fm)
    if new_fm != fm:
        path.write_text(m.group(1) + new_fm + m.group(3) + body, encoding=&#34;utf-8&#34;)

```bash
cd /home/jorap/Documents/GitHub/jorap.com && python3 << 'PYEOF'
import re
from pathlib import Path

ROOT = Path("content/english/notes")
FILES = """accept-the-starting-line analog-capture-tools atomic-notes blameless-after-action-review building-a-second-brain break-the-escalation-cycle follow-christ-then-lead follow-their-lead gentleness getting-started goodness graph habit-stacking heed-every-near-miss inbox-zero joy listen-before-fixing mobile-capture-workflows name-the-feeling network-analysis normalization-of-deviance notice-the-good okf-export outcomes-over-pitch-decks own-the-error own-your-part para-method patience peace peacemakers people-centered-design periodic-knowledge-review plain-commitments-at-work platform-reach-is-borrowed practice-small-experiments preparedness present-a-living-sacrifice pressure-reveals-weakness priorities-before-the-inbox process-over-outcomes psychological-safety purpose-and-vision quarterly-planning random-duo read-later-queue reconcile-before-the-review reconciliation-before-worship recovery reliability render-unto-caesar renewed-mind repent-and-believe resilience reversibility rollback-principle safety-by-design safety-comes-first sanctification""".split()

CONTRACTIONS = [
    ("Don't", "Do not"), ("don't", "do not"), ("Doesn't", "Does not"), ("doesn't", "does not"),
    ("Didn't", "Did not"), ("didn't", "did not"), ("Won't", "Will not"), ("won't", "will not"),
    ("Can't", "Cannot"), ("can't", "cannot"), ("Wouldn't", "Would not"), ("wouldn't", "would not"),
    ("Shouldn't", "Should not"), ("shouldn't", "should not"), ("Isn't", "Is not"), ("isn't", "is not"),
    ("Aren't", "Are not"), ("aren't", "are not"), ("Wasn't", "Was not"), ("wasn't", "was not"),
    ("I'm", "I am"), ("I'd", "I would"), ("I'll", "I will"), ("I've", "I have"),
    ("you're", "you are"), ("you'd", "you would"), ("you'll", "you will"), ("you've", "you have"),
    ("we're", "we are"), ("we've", "we have"), ("they're", "they are"), ("they'd", "they would"),
    ("who'd", "who would"), ("it's", "it is"), ("couldn't", "could not"),
]

FM = re.compile(r"^(---\s*\n)(.*?)(\n---)", re.DOTALL)

def expand(text):
    for old, new in CONTRACTIONS:
        text = text.replace(old, new)
    return text

for slug in FILES:
    path = ROOT / f"{slug}.md"
    raw = path.read_text(encoding="utf-8")
    m = FM.match(raw)
    if not m:
        continue
    fm, body = m.group(2), raw[m.end():]
    new_fm = expand(fm)
    if new_fm != fm:
        path.write_text(m.group(1) + new_fm + m.group(3) + body, encoding="utf-8")
        print(f"fixed {slug}")
PYEOF
```

```bash

import yaml, re
from pathlib import Path
text = Path('content/english/notes/gentleness.md').read_text()
m = re.match(r'^---\s*\n(.*?)\n---', text, re.DOTALL)
meta = yaml.safe_load(m.group(1))
print('shareable count:', len(meta.get('shareable_thought') or []))
print(meta.get('shareable_thought'))
"
```

```bash
import importlib.util, re, yaml
from pathlib import Path

spec = importlib.util.spec_from_file_location("gvl", "scripts/garden-voice-lint.py")
gvl = importlib.util.module_from_spec(spec)
spec.loader.exec_module(gvl)

files = """accept-the-starting-line analog-capture-tools atomic-notes blameless-after-action-review building-a-second-brain break-the-escalation-cycle follow-christ-then-lead follow-their-lead gentleness getting-started goodness graph habit-stacking heed-every-near-miss inbox-zero joy listen-before-fixing mobile-capture-workflows name-the-feeling network-analysis normalization-of-deviance notice-the-good okf-export outcomes-over-pitch-decks own-the-error own-your-part para-method patience peace peacemakers people-centered-design periodic-knowledge-review plain-commitments-at-work platform-reach-is-borrowed practice-small-experiments preparedness present-a-living-sacrifice pressure-reveals-weakness priorities-before-the-inbox process-over-outcomes psychological-safety purpose-and-vision quarterly-planning random-duo read-later-queue reconcile-before-the-review reconciliation-before-worship recovery reliability render-unto-caesar renewed-mind repent-and-believe resilience reversibility rollback-principle safety-by-design safety-comes-first sanctification""".split()
```

            fm,
        )

```bash
cd /home/jorap/Documents/GitHub/jorap.com && python3 << 'PYEOF'
import re
from pathlib import Path

ROOT = Path("content/english/notes")
FILES = """accept-the-starting-line analog-capture-tools atomic-notes blameless-after-action-review building-a-second-brain break-the-escalation-cycle follow-christ-then-lead follow-their-lead gentleness getting-started goodness graph habit-stacking heed-every-near-miss inbox-zero joy listen-before-fixing mobile-capture-workflows name-the-feeling network-analysis normalization-of-deviance notice-the-good okf-export outcomes-over-pitch-decks own-the-error own-your-part para-method patience peace peacemakers people-centered-design periodic-knowledge-review plain-commitments-at-work platform-reach-is-borrowed practice-small-experiments preparedness present-a-living-sacrifice pressure-reveals-weakness priorities-before-the-inbox process-over-outcomes psychological-safety purpose-and-vision quarterly-planning random-duo read-later-queue reconcile-before-the-review reconciliation-before-worship recovery reliability render-unto-caesar renewed-mind repent-and-believe resilience reversibility rollback-principle safety-by-design safety-comes-first sanctification""".split()

CONTRACTIONS = [
    ("Don't", "Do not"), ("don't", "do not"), ("Doesn't", "Does not"), ("doesn't", "does not"),
    ("Didn't", "Did not"), ("didn't", "did not"), ("Won't", "Will not"), ("won't", "will not"),
    ("Can't", "Cannot"), ("can't", "cannot"), ("Wouldn't", "Would not"), ("wouldn't", "would not"),
    ("Shouldn't", "Should not"), ("shouldn't", "should not"), ("Isn't", "Is not"), ("isn't", "is not"),
    ("I'm", "I am"), ("I'd", "I would"), ("I'll", "I will"), ("I've", "I have"),
    ("you're", "you are"), ("you'd", "you would"), ("you'll", "you will"), ("you've", "you have"),
    ("we've", "we have"), ("who'd", "who would"), ("it's", "it is"), ("couldn't", "could not"),
]

BIBLE = {
    "break-the-escalation-cycle": (
        '  {{< bible "Matthew 5:39" >}}\n'
        "  - Refuse to match insult for insult - break the loop before tone for tone takes over.\n"
    ),
    "follow-christ-then-lead": (
        '  {{< bible "Matthew 16:24" >}}\n'
        "  - Deny self and follow Christ first when org-chart pressure and gospel command pull different ways.\n"
    ),
    "outcomes-over-pitch-decks": (
        '  {{< bible "Matthew 7:16-20" >}}\n'
        "  - Judge vendors and champions by fruit over time, not slide polish or LinkedIn aura.\n"
    ),
    "plain-commitments-at-work": (
        '  {{< bible "Matthew 5:37" >}}\n'
        "  - Say yes or no plainly - hype on a weak promise is the real problem.\n"
    ),
    "priorities-before-the-inbox": (
        '  {{< bible "Matthew 6:33" >}}\n'
        "  - Seek first what actually matters - one protected block before the inbox rewrites the morning.\n"
    ),
    "reconcile-before-the-review": (
        '  {{< bible "Matthew 5:23-24" >}}\n'
        "  - Fix the relationship breach before OKRs, demos, or reorg meetings.\n"
    ),
}

DESC = {
    "blameless-after-action-review": "After rollback restores service, teams learn what broke in the system - not who to punish.",
    "break-the-escalation-cycle": "Break the escalation cycle - do not match tone for tone when a sharp email lands; stop the loop first.",
    "platform-reach-is-borrowed": "Platform reach is borrowed - do not build only where an algorithm can take it away.",
    "recovery": "Recovery is not optional padding - sleep and rest restore judgment before the next hard call.",
}

EXAMPLES = {
    "name-the-feeling": (1, "My kid came home furious about homework and naming the unfair feeling beat jumping straight to just do it."),
    "notice-the-good": (0, "After practice I told the kid who boxed out every drill that his rebounds won the scrimmage and he should keep sealing like that."),
    "notice-the-good2": (1, "I emailed the intern that catching the duplicate invoice before I did saved us a call - specific beats a generic thanks slide."),
}

FM = re.compile(r"^(---\s*\n)(.*?)(\n---)", re.DOTALL)

def expand(s):
    for a, b in CONTRACTIONS:
        s = s.replace(a, b)
    return s

for slug in FILES:
    p = ROOT / f"{slug}.md"
    if not p.exists():
        continue
    raw = p.read_text(encoding="utf-8")
    m = FM.match(raw)
    if not m:
        continue
    fm = expand(m.group(2))
    if slug in DESC:
        fm = re.sub(r'^description: ".*?"', f'description: "{DESC[slug]}"', fm, count=1, flags=re.M)
    if slug in BIBLE and "{{< bible" not in fm.split("key_concept:", 1)[-1][:250]:
        fm = re.sub(r"(key_concept: \|\n)", r"\1" + BIBLE[slug], fm, count=1)
    if slug == "gentleness" and fm.count("shareable_thought:") == 1:
        if "The Beatitudes bless the meek" not in fm:
            fm = fm.replace(
                '  - "Hear before you prescribe - loud correction without love is not Spirit-grown gentleness."\nrelationships:',
                '  - "Hear before you prescribe - loud correction without love is not Spirit-grown gentleness."\n'
                '  - "The Beatitudes bless the meek - strength without grasping for status."\nrelationships:',
            )
    if slug == "name-the-feeling":
        fm = re.sub(
            r'  - "My kid came home furious about homework[^"]*"\n',
            f'  - "{EXAMPLES["name-the-feeling"][1]}"\n',
            fm,
        )
    if slug == "notice-the-good":
        fm = re.sub(
            r'  - "After practice I told the kid[^"]*"\n',
            f'  - "{EXAMPLES["notice-the-good"][1]}"\n',
            fm,
        )
        fm = re.sub(
            r'  - "I emailed the intern[^"]*"\n',
            f'  - "{EXAMPLES["notice-the-good2"][1]}"\n',
            fm,
        )
    new = m.group(1) + fm + m.group(3) + raw[m.end():]
    if new != raw:
        p.write_text(new, encoding="utf-8")
        print(slug)
PYEOF
```
